equipment: Barbell, Dumbbells, Kettlebells, Pull-up Bar, Bands
coach_note: This program prioritizes athletic performance over aesthetics. Every session starts with mobility work and includes explosive power training before strength work. Kettlebell movements are featured heavily for their unique ability to build strength, power, and conditioning simultaneously. Focus on movement quality — if form breaks, reduce weight.

program_notes.progression: Weeks 1-2: Establish baseline. Weeks 3-4: Add 5-10 lbs to main lifts or 1-2 reps. Week 5: Deload (40% less volume). Week 6+: New cycle with increased baseline.
program_notes.rest_days: Saturday/Sunday — Active recovery: 20-30 min walk, light stretching, recreational sports.
program_notes.nutrition: Protein target: 0.8-1g per pound bodyweight. Hydrate before training.
program_notes.sleep: 7-8 hours minimum for optimal recovery and CNS adaptation.

schedule.warmup: 5 min bike/row + 90/90 Hip Switches (10 ea), World's Greatest Stretch (5 ea), Cossack Squat Flow (8 ea), Ankle Rocks (15 ea)

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.notes: Hip hinge explosively, squeeze glutes at top

exercises.name: Box Jump (step down)
exercises.notes: Focus on soft landing, full hip extension

exercises.name: Goblet Squat (KB)
exercises.notes: Pause 2 sec at bottom, elbows inside knees

exercises.name: Front Squat
exercises.notes: Main lift — controlled descent, drive through heels

exercises.name: KB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Single or double KB, hinge at hips

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Hold KB goblet or racked position

exercises.name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge
exercises.notes: Drive through heel, squeeze at top

exercises.name: Banded Lateral Walk
exercises.notes: Band above knees, stay low

schedule.cooldown: Deep Squat Hold (2 min cumulative) + Hip Flexor Stretch (60s each side)

schedule.warmup: 5 min cardio + Shoulder CARS (5 ea direction), Wall Slides (12), Thread the Needle (8 ea), Prone Y-T-W (8 each)

exercises.name: KB Halo
exercises.notes: Shoulder activation and mobility

exercises.name: Plyo Push-Up
exercises.notes: Explosive — hands leave ground. Scale to clap or regular

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.notes: Main lift — control descent, drive explosively

exercises.name: KB Push Press
exercises.notes: Use leg drive, lock out overhead

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Press
exercises.notes: 30-45° incline, full ROM

exercises.name: KB Floor Press
exercises.notes: Pause at bottom, eliminate bounce

exercises.name: Dips
exercises.notes: Control descent, lean forward slightly for chest

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.notes: Slow eccentric, external rotate at top

schedule.cooldown: Dead Hang (60s cumulative) + Doorway Pec Stretch (30s each side)

schedule.warmup: 5 min cardio + Cat-Cow (10), Thoracic Rotations (8 ea), Banded Pull-Aparts (15), Prone Swimmers (10)

exercises.name: KB High Pull
exercises.notes: Explosive hip drive, elbow high

exercises.name: Med Ball Slam
exercises.notes: Full hip extension, slam with aggression

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Up
exercises.notes: Main lift — full dead hang to chin over bar

exercises.name: KB Gorilla Row
exercises.notes: Wide stance, alternate rows, anti-rotation

exercises.name: Single-Arm KB Row
exercises.notes: Pull to hip, squeeze lat at top

exercises.name: KB Upright Row
exercises.notes: Lead with elbows, don't shrug

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.notes: External rotation at end range

exercises.name: KB Curl (hammer grip)
exercises.notes: Neutral grip on KB horns

schedule.cooldown: Foam Roll Thoracic Spine (2 min) + Child's Pose with Reach (60s each side)

schedule.warmup: 5 min cardio + Arm Circles (20 ea), Band Dislocates (10), Scapular Push-Ups (12), Wrist Circles (10 ea)

exercises.name: KB Snatch
exercises.notes: Power movement — hip drive, punch through

exercises.name: Med Ball Rotational Throw
exercises.notes: Generate power from hips, release at chest height

exercises.name: KB Push Press
exercises.notes: Leg drive into explosive press

exercises.name: Chin-Ups
exercises.notes: Supinated grip, full ROM

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling KB Press
exercises.notes: Core engagement, vertical forearm

exercises.name: KB Renegade Row
exercises.notes: Plank position, minimize hip rotation

exercises.name: Turkish Get-Up
exercises.notes: Slow and controlled, master each position

exercises.name: Pallof Press
exercises.notes: Anti-rotation — resist the pull

schedule.cooldown: Hang from Bar (90s total) + Shoulder CARS (3 each side, slow)

schedule.warmup: 5 min cardio + Hip Flexor Stretch (60s ea), Pigeon Pose (60s ea), Squat-to-Stand (8), Single-Leg Balance (30s ea, eyes closed)

exercises.name: KB Swing (heavy)
exercises.notes: Power — max hip drive, heavy bell

exercises.name: Lateral Bounds
exercises.notes: Explosive lateral power, stick landing

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Main lift — heavy, controlled, full depth

exercises.name: Trap Bar Deadlift
exercises.notes: Neutral grip, drive through floor

exercises.name: KB Walking Lunge
exercises.notes: Rack or farmer carry position

exercises.name: KB Single-Leg RDL
exercises.notes: Balance and posterior chain focus

exercises.name: Nordic Curl (eccentric)
exercises.notes: Slow descent only if needed, push up

exercises.name: KB Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Hold KB, slow 3 sec eccentric

schedule.cooldown: Deep Squat Hold (2 min) + Lying Spinal Twist (60s each side)
